# Columns: id: # Run: long-run/20260422-203219  Total: 26 tasks (recovery: TA.1/TA.2 prepended; T0.1/T0.2/T0.3 marked DONE post-hoc)

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_persona_critique_bedrock.py -q
accept: persona_critique.py and bench_personas.py use AnthropicBedrock() client when CLAUDE_CODE_USE_BEDROCK=1; model IDs read from ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_{SONNET,HAIKU,OPUS}_MODEL env vars with Bedrock-format defaults; backward-compat path for direct API preserved; smoke-import clean
title: Port persona_critique.py and bench_personas.py to Bedrock

validate: .venv/bin/python scripts/bench_personas.py --dry-run && test -f config/persona_model.json && .venv/bin/python -c "import json; m=json.load(open('config/persona_model.json'))['model']; assert m.startswith('us.anthropic.') or m.startswith('global.anthropic.'), f'model {m} is not a Bedrock ID'"
accept: config/persona_model.json contains a Bedrock-format model ID; docs/persona_model_benchmark.md documents the Bedrock benchmark run
title: Re-benchmark personas under Bedrock and commit selected model

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_venue_addresses.py -q
accept: Every venue in master_config.yaml has address + display_name; unit test green

validate: .venv/bin/python -c "import json,subprocess; subprocess.run(['.venv/bin/python','update_website_data.py','--test-week','--force-reprocess'],check=False); d=json.load(open('docs/data.json')); events=[e for v in d.values() for e in (v if isinstance(v,list) else [])]; assert any(ev.get('venue_address') for ev in events), 'no venue_address in data.json'"
accept: docs/data.json events carry venue_address + venue_display_name fields
title: Propagate venue address and display name into data.json

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_api_json.py -q && .venv/bin/python scripts/build_api_json.py && .venv/bin/python -c "import json; v=json.load(open('docs/api/venues.json')); assert all('address' in x and 'display_name' in x for x in (v if isinstance(v,list) else v.values()))"
accept: docs/api/venues.json entries all have address and display_name keys
title: Add address and display_name to venues api.json

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_event_shells.py -q && .venv/bin/python -c "import glob,re; files=glob.glob('docs/events/*.html'); sample=open(files[0]).read() if files else ''; assert 'streetAddress' in sample, 'no streetAddress in event shell JSON-LD'"
accept: Event shell JSON-LD location.address includes streetAddress and postalCode

validate: .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_build_event_ics.py -q && .venv/bin/python scripts/build_event_ics.py && .venv/bin/python -c "import glob; files=glob.glob('docs/events/*.ics'); assert len(files)>=10; body=open(files[0]).read(); assert 'BEGIN:VCALENDAR' in body and 'SUMMARY:' in body"
